name: jarvis-desk
description: jarvis-desk — Calm, robust desktop app for Jarvis. Built on /chat/stream/v2 Anthropic-style protocol.

scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -k -n vite,electron -c blue,green "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5174 && npm run build:electron && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
